payload.answer: I can’t treat that as a memory to store. It’s an instruction attempting to override memory policy rather than a durable personal fact.
repair_options: Ignore the prompt-injection instruction and do not save anything.
If you intended to save a real preference or fact, restate it as a specific durable memory for review.
